should_trigger.input: Help me plan this database schema migration before I run it
should_trigger.reason: Pre-change safety planning for a destructive operation

should_trigger.input: I need to rename a critical API endpoint — what's the safest approach?
should_trigger.reason: Potentially breaking change needing a safety plan

should_trigger.input: Plan the rollback strategy for this infrastructure change

should_not_trigger.input: Just do the rename for me
should_not_trigger.reason: Direct execution without planning — requires implement-changes after approval

should_not_trigger.input: Review the risk of this PR
should_not_trigger.reason: Code review including risk assessment is review-changes

should_not_trigger.input: Design how to implement this feature
should_not_trigger.reason: Feature design is design-changes; this Skill focuses on pre-execution safety planning
